nasb.text: Now when Simon saw that the Spirit was bestowed through the laying on of the apostles’ hands, he offered them money,

esv.text: Now when Simon saw that the Spirit was given through the laying on of the apostles’ hands, he offered them money,

cnv.text: 西門看見使徒一按手，就有聖靈賜下來，就拿錢給他們，

ccb.text: 西门看见使徒把手一按在人身上，就有圣灵赐下来，便拿钱给使徒，

csbs.text: 西门看见因着使徒们的按手，有圣灵赐下，就拿了钱给他们，
